title: Mace to Arcane Hammer
description: Retextures the mace to an Arcane-inspired hammer model
body:
![Arcane Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62c865caf2d80c4b94bd55469ef49ab630ce5242_0.webp)

### **ABOUT**

Retextures the **mace** to an **Arcane-inspired hammer** model. The design incorporates arcane engineering from the TV show Arcane. This engineering concept takes harnessed magic as an energy source of multiple items. If you are tired of the look of the vanilla mace and want to add a mage-punky or arcane feel to your game, this is perfect for you! The texture is 128x128.


_note: this only changes the mace texture itself, not the heavy core._

### **COMPATIBILITY**
Works in versions 1.21.9 to 1.21.10.

### **SUPPORT ME**
I have just started making textures and you can support me by downloading this and future uploads. Thank you and enjoy!
